mapper.update:
UPDATE dish SET
name = #{name},
category_id = #{categoryId},
price = #{price},
image = #{image},
description = #{description},
update_time = #{updateTime},
update_user = #{updateUser}
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM dish WHERE id IN
#{id}

DELETE FROM dish_flavor WHERE dish_id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT d.id AS id, d.name AS name, d.category_id AS category_id, (SELECT name FROM category WHERE id = d.category_id) AS category_name, price, image, description, status, create_time, update_time, create_time, update_user, df.id AS flavor_id, dish_id, df.name AS flavor_name, value AS flavor_value FROM dish AS d LEFT JOIN dish_flavor AS df ON d.id = df.dish_id WHERE d.id = #{id}

SELECT d.id AS id, d.name AS name, d.category_id AS category_id, (SELECT name FROM category WHERE id = d.category_id) AS category_name, price, image, description, status, create_time, update_time, create_time, update_user, df.id AS flavor_id, dish_id, df.name AS flavor_name, value AS flavor_value FROM dish AS d LEFT JOIN dish_flavor AS df ON d.id = df.dish_id WHERE d.category_id = #{categoryId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dish(name, category_id, price, image, description, status, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user) VALUES ( #{name}, #{categoryId}, #{price}, #{image}, #{description}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser} )

INSERT INTO dish_flavor(name, value, dish_id) VALUES
(#{flavor.name}, #{flavor.value}, #{flavor.dishId})
